executionBatches.name: Missing Pages (docs referenced by code)
executionBatches.description: Create pages that <docs> tags point to but don't exist. These block code-docs link validation.
executionBatches.verification: Run node src/scripts/audit-baseline.mjs and verify broken-code-docs-links.json shows 0 broken links

executionBatches.name: Critical API Accuracy (Dispatcher + Lifecycle)
executionBatches.description: Fix the most critical API documentation inaccuracies — IDispatcher interface, DeliveryReceipt, LifecycleStage enum, SystemCommands signatures.
files_to_modify: fundamentals/dispatcher/dispatcher.md (fix IDispatcher interface, DeliveryReceipt, PublishAsync return type)
fundamentals/lifecycle/lifecycle.md (fix Task.Delay in test sample, fix SystemCommand signatures)
executionBatches.verification: Code samples should conceptually compile against current API

executionBatches.name: Missing Frontmatter (No YAML at all)
executionBatches.description: Add complete frontmatter to all 26 pages that have NONE. These pages are invisible to search and nav.
executionBatches.pages: 26 pages across perspectives (4), events (1), messaging (6), data (3), apis/graphql (6), identity (5), lenses (2), security (2)
executionBatches.verification: Run audit-baseline.mjs — frontmatter-gaps.json should show 0 pages missing 'title'

executionBatches.name: API Documentation Gaps (P1)
executionBatches.description: Fill in undocumented interfaces, methods, enums, and parameters across core docs.
key_items: LocalInvokeAndSyncAsync missing callback params + TPerspective overloads
executionBatches.verification: Read each modified page and verify all public members match code

executionBatches.name: Frontmatter Completion (codeReferences + tags)
executionBatches.description: Fill in missing codeReferences, tags with synonyms, and other partial frontmatter gaps across ALL sections.
executionBatches.scope: ~100 pages need codeReferences added. ~80 pages need tag synonym expansion.
executionBatches.verification: Run audit-baseline.mjs — frontmatter-gaps.json should show significant improvement in coverage percentages

executionBatches.name: Content Verification (per-section)
executionBatches.description: Deep source-code verification for sections that got baseline-only analysis. Read each page and corresponding library source.
executionBatches.approach: Each task requires reading the doc page AND the referenced library source. Best split into per-section sub-sessions.
executionBatches.verification: Compare each page's API descriptions against current source code

executionBatches.name: Code Sample Metadata Cleanup
executionBatches.description: Fix auto-generated code sample metadata across all pages: meaningful descriptions, proper tags, testFile/testMethod links.
executionBatches.scope: ~3118 code samples, 139 without metadata, ~2979 with auto-generated poor metadata. Consider building a script to assist.
executionBatches.verification: Run audit-baseline.mjs — code-samples-inventory.json should show improved metadata coverage

executionBatches.name: Diagrams, Redundancy, and Cross-Links
executionBatches.description: Fix diagram issues, resolve content redundancy, add missing cross-links.
items: Duplicate pipeline diagram between lifecycle-coordinator.md and lifecycle-stages.md
ASCII flow diagrams should be mermaid
System commands duplicated in routing.md and lifecycle.md
2 association pages + 2 sync pages potential overlap
executionBatches.verification: Visual review of diagrams, check for content duplication

executionBatches.name: Remaining P2 Items
executionBatches.description: Remaining low-priority items: persona gaps, contributor docs, minor fixes.

recommendedExecutionOrder: B03 — Missing Frontmatter (quick wins, unblocks search/nav)
B02 — Critical API Accuracy (core docs must be correct)
B04 — API Documentation Gaps (fill in what exists)
